summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals held a public hearing on case BZA 2025-003, a variance request by Brandon Ockey at 6608 Goshen Road to add a 36x40 building addition and two 27x8 additions to an existing accessory structure previously approved by the BZA in 2023. A neighbor spoke in favor of the project, no opposition was presented, and the variance was unanimously approved 4-0. Staff also announced the hiring of John Langenheim as part-time zoning director and noted open alternate positions on the BZA and Zoning Commission.
decisions: Approved minutes from the February 24th meeting (4-0)
Approved area variance for BZA 2025-003 allowing building additions to existing accessory structure at 6608 Goshen Road (4-0)
action_items: Staff to issue building permit to Brandon Ockey by end of the week
John Purcell to be asked if he wants to become a full BZA member (moving from alternate)
Staff forwarded Clearwell and Route 48 property issue to prosecutor for potential legal action
Staff to look into unpermitted garage situation at Clearwell and Route 48
notable_topics: Area variance request for accessory structure additions at 6608 Goshen Road (BZA 2025-003)
Hiring of John Langenheim as part-time zoning director
Open alternate positions on BZA and Zoning Commission boards
Enforcement issue at Clearwell and Route 48 regarding unpermitted garage/fence
Potential zoning code changes regarding lot requirements and lot splits
attendees: John Langenheim (mentioned, new part-time zoning director)
notes: This is a Board of Zoning Appeals (BZA) meeting, not a regular Board of Trustees meeting, despite the transcript repeatedly inserting 'Board of Trustees Meeting' text (likely from automated captioning errors). The previous variance resolution R-005-2023 required the applicant to return to the BZA for any improvements to the accessory structure. John Langenheim's hiring as part-time zoning director means he had to vacate his BZA board position. Next BZA meeting scheduled for April 29, 2025. Meeting ran from 6:30 PM to 6:55 PM.
title: BZA 3-17-2025
